Container.Name: HearthShelf-AIO

Branch.TagDescription: Latest development build from the main branch.

Container.Overview:
HearthShelf all-in-one: one container running the HearthShelf web UI AND a bundled AudiobookShelf server. This is the easiest setup - bring your audiobooks, run one container, and HearthShelf provisions and fronts AudiobookShelf for you. No separate AudiobookShelf install needed.
Point the Audiobooks path at your library and open the WebUI to start onboarding. The QuestGiver AI recommender is optional (leave AI Provider blank to disable it).
If you already run AudiobookShelf separately, use the slim HearthShelf template instead.
Container.Description: HearthShelf all-in-one - HearthShelf web UI plus a bundled AudiobookShelf server in a single container.

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: Host port for the HearthShelf web UI (the only ingress; bundled AudiobookShelf is internal).

Config.Name: Audiobooks Library
Config.Description: Your audiobook library. The bundled AudiobookShelf scans this folder.

Config.Name: HearthShelf Data
Config.Description: HearthShelf-specific state: app settings sync, QuestGiver config and history, Discover feedback (embedded SQLite).

Config.Name: AudiobookShelf Config
Config.Description: Bundled AudiobookShelf config and database (absdatabase.sqlite). The cross-user leaderboard reads this automatically.

Config.Name: AudiobookShelf Metadata
Config.Description: Bundled AudiobookShelf derived metadata (covers, transcodes, cache).

Config.Name: Public URL
Config.Description: Optional. The public URL users reach HearthShelf at (used for OIDC redirects and links). Leave blank if you only access it on your LAN. Set to your reverse-proxy hostname for external access, e.g. https://books.example.com .

Config.Name: AI Provider
Config.Description: Optional, can be setup via UI. QuestGiver AI recommender. Leave blank to disable the AI path (the heuristic recommender still works). e.g. anthropic, openai.

Config.Name: AI Model
Config.Description: Optional, can be setup via UI. Model id for the AI provider above.

Config.Name: AI API Key
Config.Description: Optional, can be setup via UI. API key for the AI provider. Held server-side, never sent to the browser.

Config.Name: AI Base URL
Config.Description: Optional, can be setup via UI. Override the AI provider base URL (for self-hosted/compatible endpoints).

Config.Name: AI Rate Limit
Config.Description: Optional, can be setup via UI. Per-user monthly QuestGiver request cap, or 'off' for unlimited.

Config.Name: QuestGiver Enabled
Config.Description: Optional, can be setup via UI. Enable the QuestGiver guided AI matchmaker surface.

Config.Name: Discover Enabled
Config.Description: Optional, can be setup via UI. Enable the ambient Discover history shelves.

Config.Name: ReadMeABook URL
Config.Description: Optional, can be setup via UI. ReadMeABook acquisition backend URL. Leave blank to hide the Requests UI.

Config.Name: ReadMeABook Token
Config.Description: Optional, can be setup via UI. Auth token for the ReadMeABook backend.
